title: Untitled Meeting
notes:
### Migration Project Context & Constraints

- Large-scale data migration with significant post-processing requirements
- CJ approved additional funding for up to 7 contractors from Happiest Minds only
- Must be outcome-based engagement, not time & material
- Hard deadline: End of year (current UiPath/First Source contracts expire)

- 11 million documents processed annually
- Current system sends many docs to First Source for manual processing at high cost

### Vendor Relationships & History

- First Source: 10+ year outsourcing partner for C Extreme

- Handles document scanning, digitization, EDI conversion
- Receives documents when IPA confidence thresholds not met
- Happiest Minds background:

- Originally acquired SMI (company that built many DHX systems)
- Current exchange team being built to replace Happiest Minds contractors in 9-15 months
- SMI founders left after acquisition, started BeAutomate
- BeAutomate POC details:

- Zero-dollar POC ran 3-4 months
- Burned $100K+ in infrastructure costs
- Trained on 100K samples (50-70K purchase orders, 20-30K invoices)
- Executive decision made not to move forward with their solution

### Internal Development Strategy

- Team built LLM-based solution in 2 weeks using Claude
- Strong preference to keep core learning internal vs outsourcing to contractors
- Key technical challenges:

- Extracting complex business rules from UiPath activities
- Moving post-processing logic to Python
- Extensive QA testing requirements for 11M annual documents
- Crawl-walk-run approach preferred over big bang implementation

### Happiest Minds Evaluation Criteria

- Meeting scheduled for Monday morning to hear their proposal
- Critical evaluation questions:

1. Do they bring genuine LLM expertise we lack?
2. Can they significantly accelerate project velocity?
3. Or are they learning on the job like internal team would?
- Alternative approach: Use contractors for grunt work to free internal engineers for core development
- High business value project for reputation and cost savings
- Risk reduction: Fewer customer documents sent offshore

Chat with meeting transcript: https://notes.granola.ai/t/7f55089c-0b86-4b02-b924-cd2f28d22b43
